summary: DHH promotes Reboot 7, a Danish internet conference happening June 10-11 in Copenhagen. He highlights the event's evolution from a dotcom-era gathering to a 'meetup for practical visionaries.' The conference features speakers from 37signals including himself and Jason Fried, alongside notable figures like Cory Doctorow and Jimbo Wales. He also mentions satellite events including an Umbraco meetup, a Rails gathering, and the international premiere of the Building of Basecamp talk.
key_points: Reboot conference has evolved through multiple incarnations since the dotcom bubble era
37signals is prominently featured with both DHH and Jason Fried speaking alongside major web figures
Multiple satellite events planned around the conference including Rails and Umbraco meetups
Building of Basecamp presentation making its first appearance outside the US
money_quotes: Reboot has bounced back and forth between different roles. From the 'internet businesses' day off' at the peak of the dotcom bubble to the focused 'meetup for the practical visionaries' that its billed as today.
Copenhagen is beautiful in the Summer. Reboot is a guaranteed good time with lots of learning, challenges, and a hotspot of interesting people.
Just 175 euros. To schmooze among 'heroes' and 'mavericks'. Bargain deal.
key_insight: A brief promotional post for the Reboot 7 conference in Copenhagen, notable mainly as a snapshot of the mid-2000s web community and DHH's rising profile as a Rails evangelist.
